scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev -w apps/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.base.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend && npm run typecheck -w apps/backend
